name: Your daughter is getting bullied
description:
Your normally happy daughter comes home runs to her room crying. And being a good parent (as you SHOULD be!) you go to her to figure out what's wrong.

I know this way seem a little messed up. But lately I have been watching a few Reddit stories about people and their kids going through some bad stuff (Most are most likely fake But I don't care) I search this website for something similar. Most likely this type of plot but I couldn't find it at all. Mostly because the search is being a little unhelpful bitch.

Update: Jesus Christ. It's barely been a day and yet there's already a lot of people using this but
creator: Jade_Made
